summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Trinaaya Consultancy fintech website. All 7 pages load correctly, navigation works perfectly, EMI calculator functions properly, tab switching works on both Solutions and Tools pages, WhatsApp/phone floating buttons link correctly, contact forms have all required fields, and mobile responsiveness is working.

Tools page tabs switch between EMI Calculator, Eligibility Checker, and Compare Loans
WhatsApp floating button links to wa.me/918360073636
Phone floating button links to tel:+919958973636

Lead form on home page has all fields (name, mobile, loan type, amount) with WhatsApp submit
Testimonials page shows 10 testimonials with stats and case highlights sections
About page has philosophy, mission/vision, expertise, and core values sections

Footer shows correct contact info: J 1204 Corona Optus, kunal.handa@trinaaya.com, +91 9958973636
